internal_anchors.details: All 67 WIN detail anchors (id="winNNN") present. All showTab() targets resolve to existing tabs. Test suite confirmed 1791/1791 tests pass including internal link resolution.

tab_structure.details: 10 tabs (overview, evaluate, model, wins, pages, predictions, falsify, selftest, ai, refs). Nav chain is continuous: overview → evaluate → model → wins → pages → predictions → falsify → selftest → ai → refs. First tab (overview) has no prev, last tab (refs) has no next. No heading hierarchy violations detected.

external_links.details: 47 non-citation external links checked (DOI/publisher domains excluded). 45 OK, 2 broken. The CUORE experiment site (cuore.lngs.infn.it) returns 404 — the experiment may have moved or been archived. The GFZ CHAMP satellite page (op.gfz-potsdam.de/champ/) returns 404 — CHAMP mission ended in 2010, archive page may have been reorganized.

data_prose_consistency.details: Build output computes: total=67, new_in_v51=28, Refuted by Data=9, Self-Contradicted=12, Misleading=23, Std Model Explains=16, Not Demonstrated=3, Unfalsifiable=4. Code analysis: reviewed=59, pending=8, hardcoded=24, live_fetch=6, none=29, relabels_standard=36, post_hoc=47, derives_from_dome=4. All counts match wins.json. Summary table has 69 verdict-class rows (67 WINs + 2 header/spacer rows).

win_detail_consistency.details: All 67 WIN detail anchors (id="winNNN") present in HTML. detail_group values are internally consistent. Test suite confirms schema validity and cross-references.

build_reproducibility.details: Minor build drift: 1 line difference in Part 4.5 prose. Published HTML has longer Polaris description ('Polaris excess, where the dome model's own refraction formula fails by two orders of magnitude') while generate-html.js source has shorter version ('Polaris'). The source version is more concise. This suggests the source was updated after the last publish, or the HTML was hand-edited. Not a data integrity issue — prose wording only.

issues_found.suggested_fix: Update link to CUORE's new location or use an archived/institutional reference page (e.g., INFN or LNGS main site)
Update link to GFZ's current CHAMP archive page or use the ISDC data portal

issues_found.description: Published HTML has 1 line of prose that differs from generate-html.js source (Polaris description in Part 4.5)
issues_found.suggested_fix: Run 'node build.js publish' to sync published HTML with source, or update source to match preferred wording

summary: Site is structurally sound. Test suite passes 1791/1791. All 67 WIN detail anchors present, tab navigation chain intact (10 tabs), heading hierarchy clean, data-prose counts all match. Two external data source links are broken (CUORE and GFZ CHAMP — both are older experiment/mission pages likely reorganized). Minor build drift: 1 prose line differs between source and published HTML (Polaris description wording). No critical issues.
